title: Cost Indicators & Query Patterns
description: Cost indicators, clause counts, and query pattern analysis.

panels.title: Flagged Requests
panels.description: Requests with at least one cost indicator firing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) AND stress_cost_indicator_count >= 1 GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Indicator Count
panels.description: Mean number of cost indicators per request.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS t, avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Stress Multiplier
panels.description: Mean stress multiplier applied to base score.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS t, avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Max Stress Multiplier
panels.description: Largest stress multiplier observed in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS t, max(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Score Composition by Template
panels.description: Stacked contribution of each base-score component (Took / Shards / Hits / Bonus) per template — shows what drives the score.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS bucket, avg(stress_components_took) AS "Took", avg(stress_components_shards) AS "Shards", avg(stress_components_hits) AS "Hits", avg(stress_components_bonus) AS "Bonus" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY 1 ASC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Base vs Final Score by Template
panels.description: Base score vs multiplier vs final score per template — reveals whether stress is driven by the base or the multiplier.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", count() AS "Requests", avg(stress_base) AS "Avg Base", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Multiplier", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Final Score", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Indicators" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Templates by Cost Indicator Count
panels.description: Templates ranked by average cost indicator count — query optimization candidates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS "Avg Indicators", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Avg Multiplier", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Stress", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Avg Indicators" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Score Breakdown by Template
panels.description: Full per-template breakdown: score, multiplier, weighted components, and raw ES metrics (latency percentiles, shards, hits).

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_template AS "Template", count() AS "Requests", avg(stress_score) AS "Avg Score", avg(stress_multiplier) AS "Multiplier", avg(stress_components_took) AS "ES Took (weighted)", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)", avg(stress_components_shards) AS "Shards (weighted)", avg(response_shards_total) AS "Shards (raw)", avg(stress_components_hits) AS "Hits (weighted)", avg(response_hits) AS "Hits (raw)", avg(stress_components_bonus) AS "Bonus" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Template" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Score Components
panels.description: Stacked trend of the four base-score components (Took, Shards, Hits, Bonus) over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(stress_components_took) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(stress_components_shards) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(stress_components_hits) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(stress_components_bonus) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Base Score by Template
panels.description: Average base stress score over time, per template.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_base) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Multiplier by Template
panels.description: Average stress multiplier over time, per template.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Avg Cost Indicators by Application
panels.description: Average number of cost indicators per request over time, broken down by applicative provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Flagged vs Total Requests
panels.description: Count of flagged (≥1 cost indicator) vs total requests — the ratio indicates how many queries are suboptimal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) AND stress_cost_indicator_count >= 1 GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Cost Indicator Types - Frequency
panels.description: How often each cost indicator type fires in the selected period.

targets.rawSql: SELECT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) AS bucket, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Stress Multiplier by Application
panels.description: Average stress multiplier per applicative provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS bucket, avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Cost Indicator Count by Target Index
panels.description: Average cost indicators per request, per target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, avg(stress_cost_indicator_count) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Stress Multiplier by Target Index
panels.description: Average stress multiplier per target index.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, avg(stress_multiplier) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

panels.title: Clause Count Trends
panels.description: Average per-request counts of heavy clause types over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_terms_values) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_agg) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_script) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_wildcard) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Bool Clause Breakdown
panels.description: Stacked trend of bool clause types per request (must / should / filter / must_not).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(clause_counts_bool_must) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
